facebook.caption: If you are heading to Phu Quoc, a stop at Phu Quoc Beach on Tran Hung Dao Street is pretty much essential. This stretch of coastline gives you that classic island experience, with calm waters, soft sand, and the kind of scenery that makes you forget you ever had a to-do list. Rated 4.2 out of 5 by 190 visitors, it consistently earns its place on traveler itineraries. Early mornings are especially peaceful before the crowds arrive, so set that alarm and enjoy the beach almost to yourself. Practical tip: bring cash for snacks and drinks from nearby vendors, as card payments are not always available.

instagram.caption: Soft sand, calm water, and that warm island glow. Phu Quoc Beach on Tran Hung Dao Street is the kind of place that earns its 4.2-star reputation visit after visit. Go early for the best light and the quietest shoreline. Your travel album will thank you.

tiktok.caption: This beach in Phu Quoc hits different at sunrise. Go early, thank us later. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBeach #VietnamTravel #BeachLife #TravelTip

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc's beach is waiting for you
scenes: Located on Tran Hung Dao Street
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: Sonasea Public Beach on Bai Truong is one of those spots in Phu Quoc that feels both relaxed and polished at the same time. Rated 4.4 out of 5 by over 100 visitors, it sits along the well-loved Long Beach stretch, giving you easy access to calm waters and a lively shoreline atmosphere. Whether you're after a lazy morning swim or a golden-hour stroll, this beach delivers. Practical tip: arrive before 9 AM on weekends to snag a good spot before the crowds settle in.

instagram.caption: Calm water, soft sand, and a beach that actually lives up to the hype. Sonasea Public Beach on Bai Truong is a solid choice for your Phu Quoc beach day. Rated 4.4/5 and popular for good reason. Go early for the best experience.

tiktok.caption: This beach in Phu Quoc is rated 4.4/5 for a reason. Go early, thank us later. #PhuQuoc #BaiTruong #VietnamTravel #BeachDay

video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip!

items.placeName: Milana Beach Resort & Spa Phú Quốc

facebook.caption: Milana Beach Resort & Spa in Phu Quoc offers a refreshing take on island living. Rustic bungalows set a relaxed, back-to-nature tone, while a private beach area means you can enjoy the shoreline without fighting for space. Guests also have access to an outdoor pool, a spa, and on-site dining, so everything you need is within easy reach. With a solid 4.1 out of 5 from over 800 reviews, this informal resort earns its reputation as a comfortable, laid-back retreat. Practical tip: book a bungalow closest to the beach for the best morning views and easiest sand access.

instagram.caption: Rustic bungalows, a private beach, a pool, a spa, and on-site dining. Milana Beach Resort in Phu Quoc keeps things casual and comfortable, rated 4.1/5 by 800+ guests. Tip: request a bungalow near the beach for those golden-hour mornings.

tiktok.caption: Private beach, rustic bungalows, and a spa in Phu Quoc. Milana Resort keeps it chill. #PhuQuoc #BeachResort #VietnamTravel #IslandLife
